summary: Testing of new features: ExecutionCard debit/credit table, bill items table, TerceroCard (nuevo tercero). Critical bug found and fixed: React Hook rules violation in TerceroCard. Critical blocker found: LLM budget exceeded preventing AI chat from working.

critical.issue: LLM budget exceeded: Current cost $1.0335 > Max budget $1.001. Error: litellm.BadRequestError - Budget has been exceeded. All AI chat messages fail after budget hit.

ui_bugs.issue: React Hook 'useState' called conditionally after early return (if !action return null). ESLint error caused app to not compile. FIXED by moving hooks before early return.

integration_issues.issue: Could not test - LLM budget exceeded before reaching TerceroCard test. AI returns 'Hubo un error' due to budget limit.

test_results.test_1_login: PASS - Login with contabilidad@roddos.com redirects to /agente-contable
test_results.test_2_debit_credit_table: PASS - ExecutionCard shows 'Asiento Contable' section with Débito/Crédito columns and Totales row. Balanced: $3.000.000 = $3.000.000
test_results.test_3_bill_items_table: PASS - ExecutionCard shows 'Items de Compra' section with Cant., Precio Unit., Subtotal columns
test_results.test_4_tercero_card: BLOCKED - LLM budget exceeded, AI returns error instead of TerceroCard

action_items: CRITICAL: Increase LLM budget limit (currently $1.001, exceeded at $1.033) in litellm configuration to continue AI testing
After budget fix: Re-test TerceroCard flow (Tests 4, 5, 6) - code looks correct but couldn't verify end-to-end
TerceroCard React Hook fix was applied: useState hooks moved before early return in TerceroCard component
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: TerceroCard had React Hook rules violation - useState called after conditional return. Now fixed.
TerceroCard code logic looks correct: fields editable (name, nit, email), confirm/cancel buttons present with correct data-testids, account suggestion section, _next_action preview panel
handleExecute correctly handles next_pending_action in sequential flow (lines 754-759)
Budget limit appears too low for the number of AI interactions required in testing

success_rate.frontend: 60% (3/5 tested features pass, 2 blocked by budget)

context_for_next_testing_agent: React Hook bug in TerceroCard was fixed (useState moved before early return). Tests 1-3 pass. Tests 4-6 are blocked by LLM budget exceeded error (cost $1.033 > budget $1.001). Main agent needs to increase the LLM budget limit before TerceroCard tests can run. After budget fix, test: tercero-card with NIT 900100200, confirm/cancel buttons, sequential action after tercero creation.

bug_1.title: React Hook rules violation in TerceroCard
bug_1.root_cause: useState hooks called after 'if (!action) return null' early return statement on lines 329-331, violating React's rules of hooks
bug_1.fix_applied: Moved all useState calls before the early return. Changed `const p = action.payload` to `const p = action?.payload` for null safety

bug_2.title: LLM Budget Exceeded
bug_2.root_cause: litellm budget limit set too low ($1.001). Exceeded during testing session ($1.033 spent).
bug_2.mitigation: Increase budget limit in litellm/emergent configuration
bug_2.error: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 1.0335660000000002, Max budget: 1.001
